---
title: "Open-Meteo Forecast"
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
using GeoDataAccess
using GeoDataAccess: DataAccessPlan, fetch, MetaData, OpenMeteoForecast
using Dates
```

[Open-Meteo Forecast](https://open-meteo.com/) provides up to 16-day weather forecasts at ~9 km
resolution.  No API key is required.  Shares the same variable set as
[Open-Meteo Archive](open_meteo_archive.qmd).

```{julia}
MetaData(OpenMeteoForecast())
```

## Example

```{julia}
plan = DataAccessPlan(OpenMeteoForecast(), (-74.0, 40.7),
    today(), today() + Day(2);
    variables = [:temperature_2m, :precipitation],
    frequency = :hourly)
plan
```

## Variables

See [Open-Meteo Archive](open_meteo_archive.qmd#variables) for the full variable list — both
sources share the same set.
